function.name: list_files
function.description: List files and subdirectories under a specific directory.

path.description: Directory path, for example 'Documents'. Empty string or '/' means the root directory.

depth.description: Listing depth: '1' for the current level only, 'infinity' for recursive listing.

function.name: list_directory_tree
function.description: Recursively list all files and subdirectories in a directory tree.

function.name: read_file
function.description: Read the contents of a specific file.

function.name: file_info
function.description: Get detailed metadata for a file or directory.

function.name: search_files
function.description: Search files and directories by name or path keyword.

query.description: Search keyword matched against file names and relative paths.

path.description: Optional directory scope. Empty string means search everywhere.

function.name: list_shares
function.description: List share records visible to the current user.

path.description: Optional path filter. Empty string lists all shares.

function.name: get_share
function.description: Get details for a single share link or share record.

function.name: list_public_links
function.description: List all public share links.

path.description: Optional path filter for public links under a specific path.

function.name: list_user_shares
function.description: List share records shared with internal users.

path.description: Optional path filter for internal shares.

function.name: create_folder
function.description: Create a new directory.

function.name: upload_file
function.description: Upload or overwrite a file.

overwrite.description: Whether overwriting an existing file is allowed. Default: true.

function.name: delete_path
function.description: Delete a file or directory, including all child contents. This is destructive and irreversible.

path.description: Path of the file or directory to delete.

function.name: move_path
function.description: Move or rename a file or directory.

overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite the destination if it already exists. Default: false.

function.name: rename_path
function.description: Rename a file or directory within the current parent directory.

new_name.description: New file or directory name, without the parent path.

overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite the destination if it already exists. Default: false.

function.name: copy_path
function.description: Copy a file or directory.

overwrite.description: Whether to overwrite the destination if it already exists. Default: false.

function.name: create_public_link
function.description: Create a public share link for a file or directory.

path.description: Path of the file or directory to share.

password.description: Optional password for the public link.

expire_date.description: Optional expiration date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

function.name: create_share
function.description: Compatibility alias for creating a public link share.

path.description: Path of the file or directory to share.

password.description: Optional password for the public link.

expire_date.description: Optional expiration date in YYYY-MM-DD format.

function.name: create_user_share
function.description: Share a file or directory with an internal user.

path.description: Path of the file or directory to share.

function.name: update_share_permissions
function.description: Update the permissions of a share record.

permissions.description: New permission bitmask, for example 1=read-only, 15=full access.

function.name: delete_share
function.description: Delete a share link or share record.
